title: Thai-Style Chestnut Mushroom Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Thai-inspired dish made with chestnut mushrooms and a blend of Thai spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the stew seasoning and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the mushroom broth and bring to a simmer.
Stir in the chopped Thai basil and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the mushroom mixture over cooked fluffy rice.
Garnish with additional Thai basil leaves, if desired.
